sociological_trends: decentralized identity as a status symbol
algorithmic transparency as a competitive edge
community-driven moderation as a trust signal

experimental_hooks.guidance: Post threads revealing how you migrated from centralized platforms to Bluesky, detailing technical hurdles and ideological shifts. Use code snippets or JSON dumps of migration scripts to add authenticity.

factual_knowledge: Bluesky had 37.4 million registered users as of July 2025.
Bluesky launched publicly in March 2025 after being incubated by Twitter co-founder Jack Dorsey.
Bluesky's decentralized architecture uses the AT Protocol, enabling user-controlled data portability.
Verified accounts on Bluesky receive 30% more follower growth than unverified accounts.
Posts with embedded polls receive 40% higher engagement than text-only posts.
Bluesky's trending topics are algorithmically curated but community-vetted via upvote thresholds.
Profile banners with animated GIFs receive 25% more profile visits than static images.
